title: Sheet-Pan Lemon Herb Chicken
steps: Heat oven to 220C / 425F.
Toss potatoes, halved lemon wedges, garlic, oil, oregano, salt and pepper on a sheet pan.
Nestle in the chicken thighs skin-side up and season.
Roast 35 minutes until chicken is 75C and potatoes are golden.
notes: Great with a simple green salad.

title: Chickpea Coconut Curry
steps: Cook rice per package.
Soften onion, garlic and ginger in oil 5 minutes.
Add curry powder, stir 1 minute, then chickpeas and coconut milk.
Simmer 15 minutes, wilt in spinach, season and serve over rice.

title: Caprese Pasta Salad
steps: Boil pasta until al dente, drain and cool under cold water.
Halve tomatoes and mozzarella, tear basil.
Toss everything with oil, balsamic, salt and pepper.

title: Quick Beef & Veggie Stir-Fry
steps: Cook rice. Slice all vegetables.
Sear beef in a hot wok 2 minutes, remove.
Stir-fry vegetables 4 minutes, add garlic and ginger.
Return beef, add soy sauce, toss 1 minute, serve over rice.

title: Mediterranean Grain Bowl
steps: Cook quinoa and cool.
Dice cucumber, tomatoes and red onion.
Combine with chickpeas and crumbled feta.
Dress with lemon juice, olive oil, salt and pepper. Keeps 4 days.

title: Miso-Glazed Salmon
steps: Whisk miso, honey and soy. Brush over salmon.
Bake at 200C / 400F for 12-15 minutes.
Steam green beans, serve with rice.

title: Turkey & Black Bean Tacos
steps: Brown the turkey in a pan, 6-8 minutes.
Add taco seasoning and drained black beans, cook 4 minutes.
Warm the tortillas.
Fill with turkey, shredded lettuce, diced tomato, cheese and a squeeze of lime.

title: Lentil Bolognese
steps: Finely dice onion, carrot and celery; soften in oil 8 minutes.
Add garlic and tomato paste, stir 1 minute.
Add lentils, chopped tomatoes and a cup of water. Simmer 25 minutes until lentils are tender.
Cook spaghetti and serve topped with the sauce.

title: Thai Green Curry Chicken
steps: Fry curry paste in a little oil 1 minute.
Add sliced chicken, sear 4 minutes.
Pour in coconut milk, peppers and green beans; simmer 12 minutes.
Season with fish sauce, stir in basil, serve over rice.

title: Greek Chicken Souvlaki Bowls
steps: Marinate diced chicken in yogurt, lemon, garlic and oregano 15 minutes.
Cook rice.
Sear chicken in a hot pan 8-10 minutes until charred and cooked.
Build bowls with rice, chicken, cucumber and tomatoes.

title: Margherita Flatbread
steps: Heat oven to 230C / 450F.
Spread passata mixed with crushed garlic over each flatbread.
Top with torn mozzarella.
Bake 10-12 minutes, finish with fresh basil and a drizzle of oil.

title: Garlic Butter Shrimp Pasta
steps: Cook linguine until al dente.
Melt butter, fry garlic and chilli flakes 1 minute.
Add shrimp, cook 3-4 minutes until pink.
Toss with pasta, lemon juice and parsley.

title: Veggie Egg Fried Rice
steps: Scramble eggs in a hot wok, set aside.
Stir-fry diced carrot, peas and garlic 4 minutes.
Add cold cooked rice, fry 4 minutes.
Return eggs, add soy and sesame oil, finish with spring onion.

title: Tuna Avocado Salad
steps: Drain tuna and sweetcorn.
Dice avocado, tomatoes and red onion.
Toss everything with lemon juice, oil, salt and pepper.

title: Butternut Squash Soup
steps: Soften onion and garlic in a pot.
Add cubed squash, cumin and stock; simmer 25 minutes.
Blend until smooth, stir in coconut milk, season.

title: Teriyaki Tofu Stir-Fry
steps: Press and cube tofu, toss in cornstarch.
Fry tofu until golden, set aside.
Stir-fry broccoli and pepper 5 minutes.
Return tofu, add teriyaki sauce, toss; serve over rice with sesame seeds.

title: Chicken Caesar Wrap
steps: Season and pan-fry chicken 8 minutes, slice.
Toss lettuce with dressing, parmesan and croutons.
Fill wraps with chicken and salad, roll up.

title: Beef Chili con Carne
steps: Brown beef with onion and garlic.
Stir in chilli powder and cumin 1 minute.
Add tomatoes and beans; simmer 35 minutes.
Serve over rice.
notes: Freezes well for up to 3 months.

title: Pesto Pasta with Cherry Tomatoes
steps: Cook pasta, reserving a splash of water.
Halve tomatoes.
Toss pasta with pesto, tomatoes and a little pasta water.
Top with parmesan and toasted pine nuts.

title: Black Bean Quesadillas
steps: Mash beans lightly with cumin.
Spread over tortillas with cheese, diced pepper and onion; fold.
Toast in a dry pan 2-3 minutes each side until golden.

title: Honey Mustard Salmon Traybake
steps: Roast halved potatoes in oil at 200C / 400F for 15 minutes.
Add salmon and asparagus to the tray.
Brush salmon with honey-mustard mix.
Roast a further 12 minutes until salmon flakes.
